case_title: JAVIER NARANJO VS. SCOTT ALLEY ASSOCIATES, LLC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF NARANJO, JAVIER AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTT ALLEY ASSOCIATES, LLC., A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
